title: Zoho integration
excerpt: Is there integration with the Zoho crm application?

posts.author: shaikh (Sheikh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there integration with the Zoho crm application?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sheikh,

I am afraid we do not have a native integration with Zoho. You would need to look into third party applications like Zapier to achieve this. I apologise for the setback
